name: ADR validator confirms the considered options block is present and non-empty
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1
## Considered options
- Option A
- Option B
' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check options 2>out.txt && grep -q 'options_count=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
